---
title: "Auditing Crisis Pregnancy Centers: Racial Biases, Misinformation, and the Misallocation of Government Resources"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Patrick Button
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Clare Daniel
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Hussain Hadah
    url: https://www.hussainhadah.com/
    affiliation: Northwestern University
  - name: Julie Hernandez
    affiliation: Tulane University
  - name: Mirya Holman
    affiliation: ""
  - name: Anna Mahoney
    affiliation: Tulane University
categories:
  - Discrimination
  - Audit
  - Health
  - Reproductive Rights
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Patrick Button, Clare Daniel, <strong>Hussain Hadah</strong>, Julie Hernandez, Mirya Holman, &amp; Anna Mahoney. "Auditing Crisis Pregnancy Centers: Racial Biases, Misinformation, and the Misallocation of Government Resources." <em>Work in Progress</em>.
  extra: >-
    Currently developing the experimental design; expect to run in 2026.
pub-status:
  status: In Design
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-pencil
---
